recalls.Description: Ravmix is recalling their portable hook-on chairs designed for young children due to a serious fall hazard. These chairs feature a black metal frame covered in black or gray fabric and include a white plastic tray. The design allows the chair to be attached to a dining table, but the removal of the crotch restraint without tools can lead to dangerous falls, violating federal safety standards for such products.
recalls.Title: Ravmix Portable Hook-On Chairs Recalled Due to Fall Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should email Ravmix at ravmix@outlook.com for assistance.

Retailers.Name: Amazon.com and from September 2024 through March 2025 for between $40 and $60.

Distributors.Name: Yuanimi Trade Co. Ltd., d/b/a Ravmix, of China

Hazards.Name: Fall hazard due to removable crotch restraint

Remedies.Name: Stop using the chair and contact Ravmix for a refund. Follow instructions to disassemble the chair and send photos of the parts for processing the refund.

seo.metaDescription: Ravmix recalls portable hook-on chairs due to a serious fall hazard. Learn how to get a refund and ensure your child's safety.
seo.ogTitle: Ravmix Portable Hook-On Chairs Recalled Due to Fall Hazard Risk
seo.ogDescription: Ravmix recalls portable hook-on chairs due to a serious fall hazard. Learn how to get a refund and ensure your child's safety.

seo.twitterDescription: Ravmix recalls portable hook-on chairs due to a serious fall hazard. Learn how to get a refund and ensure your child's safety.

recalls.Description: Boyro Baby is recalling its high chairs due to serious safety concerns, including risks of falls and entrapment. These 4-in-1 high chairs, available in green, gray, and pink, feature a removable seat cushion, detachable tray, footrest, and storage underneath. They can transform from high chairs to low chairs, rocking chairs, and slides. The design flaws violate federal safety regulations for high chairs.
recalls.Title: Boyro Baby High Chairs Recalled for Fall and Entrapment Risks; Sold Exclusively on Amazon
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach Boyro Baby via email at boyrobaby@outlook.com or visit www.boyrobaby.com/testimonial or www.boyrobaby.com and select 'Safety Recalls'.

Images.Caption: Recalled Boyro Baby convertible high chair

Retailers.Name: Amazon.com and from October 2023 through November 2024 for between $70 and $90.

Hazards.Name: Fall hazard due to unsecured restraint system and potential entrapment risk between the seat and tray.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must immediately stop using the high chairs, disassemble them, and contact Boyro Baby for refund instructions, which include cutting the restraint system and seat cushions, and sending photos of the destroyed parts to boyrobaby@outlook.com.

seo.metaDescription: Boyro Baby recalls high chairs due to serious fall and entrapment hazards. Immediate action required for refund. Learn more here.
seo.ogTitle: Boyro Baby High Chairs Recalled for Fall and Entrapment Risks; Sold Exclusively on Amazon
